commands.review_summary:
The PR gates pending and approved Node command/capability surfaces on node-pairing approval, refreshes live surfaces after approval/removal, and adds Gateway regression coverage for pending Talk caps, direct forwarding, and offline wake pre-validation.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main returns declared commands as effective commands for first-time pending node pairing, lets NodeRegistry.invoke forward to connected nodes without a pairing-store check, and starts offline wake before approved-surface validation. I did not run the Gateway scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This is not an automated repair candidate; the patch is a security-sensitive Gateway behavior change that appears correct but needs maintainer review, current-base mergeability resolution, and CI/live-risk judgment before landing.
